function.name: parsekeyword
charclass

unit.comment: /* Include a character or a range in set. */

function.name: setcharorrange

unit.comment: /* returns 1 (true) if pattern is OK, 0 if is bad ("p" is pattern pointer) */

function.name: setcharset
loop
function.parameter_list: (const unsigned char *pattern, const unsigned char *string, int maxstars)

function.name: Curl_fnmatch
Curl_fnmatch
